title: Stale remote hero card + ws-token 503 spam after an untracked Pod death
description:
After an ephemeral A40 was reaped host-side (out-of-stock host, no user Disconnect), the app never learned the Pod was gone: hero footer stayed 'remote · online · A40 · 48GB' indefinitely, console spammed `GET /remote/ws-token 503 (wrapper_token_missing)` + `[remoteEngine] WS token fetch failed`. Hitting CONNECT (recreate-failed) incidentally emitted connected:false → footer corrected. NOT the MPI-238 connect-stage bug — this is untracked DEATH of an already-connected Pod.

SINGLE ROOT: nothing flips server-side `_mode.active=false` when a connected Pod dies without a user action. Three downstream symptoms: (1) heroStats is a pure event slave and the shell feed tick can't emit offline — its `connected !== _last` guard (js/shell.js:1102) never fires because the feed never OWNED the connect (Settings' MpiRunpodSettings.js emitted connected:true, not the feed), so `false !== false` = no emit, footer frozen. (2) /remote/ws-token (routes/remoteProxyForward.js:32) hits getWrapperToken on the dead Pod → 503 wrapper_token_missing red rows. (3) remoteEngineClient.refresh reads /remote/mode active:true → proceeds to ws-token → gets 503 → warn spam.

FIX (server-side self-heal, root not symptom): in GET /remote/comfy/status (routes/remotePodLifecycle.js), when the Pod is confirmed terminal/gone (EXITED/TERMINATED podStatus, or getPod 404 = absent) while _mode.active is still true, call setRemoteMode({active:false}) + _starting=false. ws-token then answers 200 {inactive:true} (no red row), /remote/mode goes active:false (client stops retrying), and the feed emits connected:false → footer repaints local. Must NOT false-positive on a transient RunPod network blip (getPod throw) — only flip on a definite terminal/absent signal.

Electron Security warnings (Node integration / CSP) in the same console = unrelated dev-mode boilerplate, ignore.

attention.reason: Moved to done by user decision - self-heal code shipped+unit-tested (27b9204); live untracked-Pod-death repro impractical. Card parked in done as reference; reopen if stale-hero/ws-token-503 recurs.
